  "findings": [
    "Unsealed weatherhead penetration allowing potential water ingress into the service raceway."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Seal the service entrance weatherhead and raceway penetration using an approved sealing compound or duct seal to prevent moisture from entering the service equipment."
  ],
  "rationale": "An unsealed weatherhead penetration violates NEC requirements for preventing moisture ingress into service equipment. Because the work is actively in progress, this must be corrected and sealed before final inspection and energization to prevent water damage to the electrical system.",

    "NEC Article 230.54",

  ]
